title: onobrychis susiana
intro: Onobrychis susiana, also known as Persian clover or hoary clover, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis susiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
